title: Amendments to the International Code on the Enhanced Programme of Inspections During Surveys of Bulk Carriers and Oil Tankers (ESP Code) of the International Convention for the Safety of Life at Sea [TS No.49/2025]
body: "Published title: Amendments to the International Code on the Enhanced Programme of Inspections During Surveys of Bulk Carriers and Oil Tankers (ESP Code) of the International Convention for the Safety of Life at Sea. "
